articles.author: Mike Wall
articles.title: Artemis 2 astronauts fly around the moon in record-breaking lunar loop by NASA - Space
articles.description: The four Artemis 2 astronauts have now traveled farther from Earth than anyone in history.

articles.author: Josh Dinner
articles.title: Moon memorial: Artemis 2 astronauts name lunar 'bright spot' after mission commander's late wife - Space
articles.description: "Integrity and Carroll Crater, loud and clear."

articles.author: Victor Tangermann
articles.title: Moon Astronauts Forced to Do It in Bags as "Burning Odor" Emanates From Toilet - Futurism
articles.description: The Moon astronauts' space toilet has turned out to be a considerable source of frustration — and burning smells.
articles.content:
Can’t-miss innovations from the bleeding edge of science and tech
NASAs historic Artemis 2 mission launched without a hitch last week, sending the first astronauts toward the Moon since 1972 but the… [+3144 chars]
